title: cirsium × milliati
intro: Cirsium × milliati is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between the thistle species Cirsium vulgare and Cirsium heterophyllum. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cirsium × milliati include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues and respiratory problems. Cirsium × milliati can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
